label: Congressional Hearings
deltaNote: FY2026 cycle added 2 hearings (House Oversight Sep 2025, Senate Armed Services Nov 2024)

label: AARO Cases Received
contestNote: AARO reports 2,000+ cases received since establishment. Critics note the vast majority remain unresolved, and AARO's 2025 annual report is overdue. Whistleblowers allege AARO has not been given access to the most classified programs.

label: Public Whistleblowers
contestNote: Grusch, Graves, Fravor, and Herrera testified publicly. Grusch claims 40+ additional witnesses provided classified testimony to the ICIG. AARO Historical Report Vol. 1 found 'no evidence' supporting retrieval program claims.

label: UAP Laws Enacted
deltaNote: FY2026 NDAA added 3 new UAP provisions (signed Dec 2025)

label: Presidential Directives
deltaNote: Trump ordered Pentagon to release UAP/alien files (Feb 19, 2026) — first ever presidential UAP disclosure directive
